Part 1¶

🛠 From Scratch¶

In this subsection, you should implement the Decision Tree algorithm 🌳 from scratch 🛠 and compare its performance with the library implementation 📚.

In [37]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

class Node:
    def __init__(self, feature=None, threshold=None, left=None, right=None, *, value=None):
        self.feature = feature
        self.threshold = threshold
        self.left = left
        self.right = right
        self.value = value

    def is_leaf_node(self):
        return self.value is not None

class MyDecisionTree:
    def __init__(self, max_depth=3, criterion='entropy'):
        self.max_depth = max_depth
        self.criterion = criterion
        self.root = None

    def fit(self, X, y):
        X_data = X.values if isinstance(X, pd.DataFrame) else X
        y_data = y.values if isinstance(y, pd.Series) else y
        self.n_features_ = X_data.shape[1]
        self.root = self._grow_tree(X_data, y_data)

    def predict(self, X):
        X_data = X.values if isinstance(X, pd.DataFrame) else X
        return np.array([self._traverse_tree(x, self.root) for x in X_data])

    def _grow_tree(self, X, y, depth=0):
        n_samples, n_feats = X.shape
        n_labels = len(np.unique(y))

        if (depth >= self.max_depth) or (n_labels == 1) or (n_samples == 0):
            leaf_value = self._most_common_label(y)
            return Node(value=leaf_value)

        feat_idxs = np.arange(n_feats)
        best_feat, best_thresh = self._best_split(X, y, feat_idxs)

        if best_feat is None:
            leaf_value = self._most_common_label(y)
            return Node(value=leaf_value)

        left_idxs, right_idxs = self._split(X[:, best_feat], best_thresh)
        left = self._grow_tree(X[left_idxs, :], y[left_idxs], depth + 1)
        right = self._grow_tree(X[right_idxs, :], y[right_idxs], depth + 1)
        
        return Node(best_feat, best_thresh, left, right)

    def _best_split(self, X, y, feat_idxs):
        best_gain = 0
        split_idx, split_thresh = None, None

        for feat_idx in feat_idxs:
            X_column = X[:, feat_idx]
            thresholds = np.unique(X_column)
            for thr in thresholds:
                gain = self._information_gain(y, X_column, thr)
                if gain > best_gain:
                    best_gain = gain
                    split_idx = feat_idx
                    split_thresh = thr
        return split_idx, split_thresh

    def _information_gain(self, y, X_column, threshold):
        parent_impurity = self._calculate_impurity(y)
        left_idxs, right_idxs = self._split(X_column, threshold)
        if len(left_idxs) == 0 or len(right_idxs) == 0:
            return 0
        
        n = len(y)
        n_l, n_r = len(left_idxs), len(right_idxs)
        e_l = self._calculate_impurity(y[left_idxs])
        e_r = self._calculate_impurity(y[right_idxs])
        child_impurity = (n_l / n) * e_l + (n_r / n) * e_r
        
        return parent_impurity - child_impurity

    def _split(self, X_column, split_thresh):
        left_idxs = np.argwhere(X_column <= split_thresh).flatten()
        right_idxs = np.argwhere(X_column > split_thresh).flatten()
        return left_idxs, right_idxs

    def _calculate_impurity(self, y):
        if self.criterion == 'gini':
            hist = np.bincount(y)
            ps = hist / len(y)
            return 1 - np.sum([p**2 for p in ps])
        else: 
            hist = np.bincount(y)
            ps = hist / len(y)
            return -np.sum([p * np.log2(p) for p in ps if p > 0])

    def _most_common_label(self, y):
        if len(y) == 0: return 0
        return np.bincount(y).argmax()

    def _traverse_tree(self, x, node):
        if node.is_leaf_node():
            return node.value
        if x[node.feature] <= node.threshold:
            return self._traverse_tree(x, node.left)
        return self._traverse_tree(x, node.right)






def calculate_metrics(y_true, y_pred):
    tp = np.sum((y_true == 1) & (y_pred == 1))
    tn = np.sum((y_true == 0) & (y_pred == 0))
    fp = np.sum((y_true == 0) & (y_pred == 1))
    fn = np.sum((y_true == 1) & (y_pred == 0))
    
    accuracy = (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn) if (tp + tn + fp + fn) > 0 else 0
    precision = tp / (tp + fp) if (tp + fp) > 0 else 0
    recall = tp / (tp + fn) if (tp + fn) > 0 else 0
    f1 = 2 * (precision * recall) / (precision + recall) if (precision + recall) > 0 else 0
    
    return accuracy, precision, recall, f1, [[tn, fp], [fn, tp]]

def print_tree_text(node, feature_names, depth=0):
    indent = "    " * depth
    if node.is_leaf_node():
        print(f"{indent} Leaf: Class {node.value}")
        return
    
    if node.feature is None: return

    feature_name = feature_names[node.feature]
    print(f"{indent}if {feature_name} <= {node.threshold}:")
    print_tree_text(node.left, feature_names, depth + 1)
    print(f"{indent}else:  # {feature_name} > {node.threshold}")
    print_tree_text(node.right, feature_names, depth + 1)

def plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(cm, title='Confusion Matrix'):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5, 5))
    ax.matshow(cm, cmap=plt.cm.Blues, alpha=0.7)
    
    for i in range(cm.shape[0]):
        for j in range(cm.shape[1]):
            ax.text(x=j, y=i, s=cm[i, j], va='center', ha='center', size='xx-large')
    
    plt.xlabel('Predicted Label', fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel('True Label', fontsize=12)
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xticks([0, 1], ['Unfinished (0)', 'Finished (1)'])
    plt.yticks([0, 1], ['Unfinished (0)', 'Finished (1)'])
    plt.show()

def draw_tree_graphical(node, feature_names):
    if node is None: return

    def get_leaf_count(n):
        if n.is_leaf_node(): return 1
        return get_leaf_count(n.left) + get_leaf_count(n.right)
    
    def get_depth(n):
        if n.is_leaf_node(): return 1
        return 1 + max(get_depth(n.left), get_depth(n.right))

    total_width = get_leaf_count(node)
    total_depth = get_depth(node)
    
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 8))
    ax.set_axis_off()
    node_coords = {} 
    
    def assign_coords(n, x_start, y_curr):
        if n.is_leaf_node():
            x = x_start + 0.5
            node_coords[n] = (x, y_curr)
            return x_start + 1 
        next_x_start = assign_coords(n.left, x_start, y_curr - 1)
        final_x_start = assign_coords(n.right, next_x_start, y_curr - 1)
        left_x, _ = node_coords[n.left]
        right_x, _ = node_coords[n.right]
        node_coords[n] = ((left_x + right_x) / 2, y_curr)
        return final_x_start

    assign_coords(node, 0, total_depth)
    
    def plot_node_recursive(n):
        x, y = node_coords[n]
        if n.is_leaf_node():
            bbox_props = dict(boxstyle="circle,pad=0.3", fc="#90EE90", ec="black")
            ax.text(x, y, f"Class\n{n.value}", ha="center", va="center", bbox=bbox_props, fontsize=10)
            return
        
        feature = feature_names[n.feature]
        bbox_props = dict(boxstyle="round,pad=0.4", fc="#ADD8E6", ec="black")
        ax.text(x, y, f"{feature}\n<= {n.threshold}", ha="center", va="center", bbox=bbox_props, fontsize=10)
        
        lx, ly = node_coords[n.left]
        rx, ry = node_coords[n.right]
        ax.plot([x, lx], [y, ly], 'k-', lw=1.5)
        ax.plot([x, rx], [y, ry], 'k-', lw=1.5)
        ax.text((x+lx)/2, (y+ly)/2, "True", fontsize=9, color='blue', ha='right', backgroundcolor='white')
        ax.text((x+rx)/2, (y+ry)/2, "False", fontsize=9, color='red', ha='left', backgroundcolor='white')
        
        plot_node_recursive(n.left)
        plot_node_recursive(n.right)

    plot_node_recursive(node)
    ax.set_xlim(0, total_width)
    ax.set_ylim(0, total_depth + 0.5)
    plt.title("Visualized Decision Tree")
    plt.show()
In [38]:
print("\n" + "="*50)
print("PART 1: DATASET 1 (Original Features)")
print("="*50)

df = pd.read_csv('s1_part1_dataset.csv')
skill_mapping = {'Low': 0, 'Medium': 1, 'High': 2}
df['prog_skill'] = df['prog_skill'].map(skill_mapping)

X = df[['group_size', 'meetings_per_week', 'prog_skill']]
y = df['Is_finished']

np.random.seed(42)
indices = np.random.permutation(len(df))
train_size = int(0.7 * len(df))
train_indices = indices[:train_size]
val_indices = indices[train_size:]
X_train, y_train = X.iloc[train_indices], y.iloc[train_indices]
X_val, y_val = X.iloc[val_indices], y.iloc[val_indices]

best_acc = 0
best_model = None
best_depth = 0

print("\n--- Hyperparameter (Max Depth) ---")
for d in range(1, 10):
    clf = MyDecisionTree(max_depth=d, criterion='entropy')
    clf.fit(X_train, y_train)
    preds = clf.predict(X_val)
    acc, _, _, _, _ = calculate_metrics(y_val, preds)
    if acc > best_acc:
        best_acc = acc
        best_model = clf
        best_depth = d
    print(f"Depth {d}: Accuracy = {acc:.4f}")

print(f"\n Best Depth found: {best_depth} with Accuracy: {best_acc:.4f}")

preds_best = best_model.predict(X_val)
acc, prec, rec, f1, cm = calculate_metrics(y_val, preds_best)

print("\n--- Best Model Evaluation ---")
print(f"Accuracy : {acc:.4f}")
print(f"Precision: {prec:.4f}")
print(f"Recall   : {rec:.4f}")
print(f"F1 Score : {f1:.4f}")

print("\nShowing Confusion Matrix for Dataset 1 (Best Model)...")
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(np.array(cm), title="Confusion Matrix - Dataset 1 (Best Model)")

print("\n--- Tree Structure (Graphical) ---")
draw_tree_graphical(best_model.root, list(X.columns))

print("\n--- Experiment: Decision Stump (Depth=1) ---")
clf_stump = MyDecisionTree(max_depth=1, criterion='entropy')
clf_stump.fit(X_train, y_train)
preds_stump = clf_stump.predict(X_val)
acc_s, _, _, f1_s, cm_s = calculate_metrics(y_val, preds_stump)

print(f"Accuracy : {acc_s:.4f}")
print(f"F1 Score : {f1_s:.4f}")
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(np.array(cm_s), title="Confusion Matrix - Stump (Dataset 1)")
print_tree_text(clf_stump.root, list(X.columns))




print("\n" + "="*50)
print("PART 2: DATASET 2 (With 'avg_previous_grade')")
print("="*50)

df_new = pd.read_csv('s1_part2_dataset.csv')
df_new['prog_skill'] = df_new['prog_skill'].map(skill_mapping)

X_new = df_new[['group_size', 'meetings_per_week', 'prog_skill', 'avg_previous_grade']]
y_new = df_new['Is_finished']

np.random.seed(42)
indices = np.random.permutation(len(df_new))
train_size = int(0.7 * len(df_new))
X_train_new = X_new.iloc[indices[:train_size]]
y_train_new = y_new.iloc[indices[:train_size]]
X_val_new = X_new.iloc[indices[train_size:]]
y_val_new = y_new.iloc[indices[train_size:]]

clf_deep_new = MyDecisionTree(max_depth=5, criterion='entropy')
clf_deep_new.fit(X_train_new, y_train_new)
preds_deep_new = clf_deep_new.predict(X_val_new)
acc_dn, _, _, f1_dn, cm_dn = calculate_metrics(y_val_new, preds_deep_new)

clf_stump_new = MyDecisionTree(max_depth=1, criterion='entropy')
clf_stump_new.fit(X_train_new, y_train_new)
preds_stump_new = clf_stump_new.predict(X_val_new)
acc_sn, _, _, f1_sn, cm_sn = calculate_metrics(y_val_new, preds_stump_new)

print("\n--- Comparison on New Dataset ---")
print(f"Deep Model (Depth 5): Accuracy = {acc_dn:.4f}, F1 = {f1_dn:.4f}")
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(np.array(cm_dn), title="Confusion Matrix - Deep Model (Dataset 2)")

print(f"Stump Model (Depth 1): Accuracy = {acc_sn:.4f}, F1 = {f1_sn:.4f}")
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(np.array(cm_sn), title="Confusion Matrix - Stump Model (Dataset 2)")

print("\n--- Structure of Stump Model (Depth 1) with New Feature ---")
print_tree_text(clf_stump_new.root, list(X_new.columns))

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np


df_train1 = pd.read_csv('s1_part1_dataset.csv')
skill_mapping = {'Low': 0, 'Medium': 1, 'High': 2}
df_train1['prog_skill'] = df_train1['prog_skill'].map(skill_mapping)
X_train1 = df_train1[['group_size', 'meetings_per_week', 'prog_skill']]
y_train1 = df_train1['Is_finished']

model_part1 = MyDecisionTree(max_depth=6, criterion='entropy')
model_part1.fit(X_train1, y_train1)

df_test1 = pd.read_csv('s1_part1_test.csv')
df_test1_processed = df_test1.copy()
df_test1_processed['prog_skill'] = df_test1_processed['prog_skill'].map(skill_mapping)
X_test1 = df_test1_processed[['group_size', 'meetings_per_week', 'prog_skill']]

preds1 = model_part1.predict(X_test1)

df_test1['label'] = preds1
df_test1.to_csv('s1_part1_test_predicted.csv', index=False)
print(" s1_part1_test_predicted.csv saved.")




df_train2 = pd.read_csv('s1_part2_dataset.csv')
df_train2['prog_skill'] = df_train2['prog_skill'].map(skill_mapping)
X_train2 = df_train2[['group_size', 'meetings_per_week', 'prog_skill', 'avg_previous_grade']]
y_train2 = df_train2['Is_finished']

model_part2 = MyDecisionTree(max_depth=5, criterion='entropy')
model_part2.fit(X_train2, y_train2)

df_test2 = pd.read_csv('s1_part2_test.csv')
df_test2_processed = df_test2.copy()
df_test2_processed['prog_skill'] = df_test2_processed['prog_skill'].map(skill_mapping)
X_test2 = df_test2_processed[['group_size', 'meetings_per_week', 'prog_skill', 'avg_previous_grade']]

preds2 = model_part2.predict(X_test2)

df_test2['label'] = preds2
df_test2.to_csv('s1_part2_test_predicted.csv', index=False)
print(" s1_part2_test_predicted.csv saved.")

 s1_part1_test_predicted.csv saved.
 s1_part2_test_predicted.csv saved.

Part 2¶

🧹 Data Preprocessing¶

The preprocessing part is given to you as below.

In [40]:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import nltk
import re
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.feature_extraction.text import CountVectorizer
from sklearn.naive_bayes import BernoulliNB, MultinomialNB
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score, confusion_matrix
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.stem import WordNetLemmatizer
In [41]:
nltk.download('stopwords', quiet=True)
nltk.download('wordnet', quiet=True)
nltk.download('omw-1.4', quiet=True)


stop_words = set(stopwords.words('english'))
lemmatizer = WordNetLemmatizer()

def clean_text(text):
    text = text.lower()
    text = re.sub(r'[^a-z\s]', '', text)
    words = text.split()
    clean_words = [lemmatizer.lemmatize(w) for w in words if w not in stop_words]
    return " ".join(clean_words)


def evaluate_model(y_true, y_pred, model_name):
    acc = accuracy_score(y_true, y_pred)
    prec = precision_score(y_true, y_pred, zero_division=0)
    rec = recall_score(y_true, y_pred, zero_division=0)
    f1 = f1_score(y_true, y_pred, zero_division=0)
    cm = confusion_matrix(y_true, y_pred)
    
    print(f"--- {model_name} Results ---")
    print(f"Accuracy : {acc:.4f}")
    print(f"Precision: {prec:.4f}")
    print(f"Recall   : {rec:.4f}")
    print(f"F1 Score : {f1:.4f}")
    
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(4, 4))
    ax.matshow(cm, cmap=plt.cm.Greens, alpha=0.6)
    for i in range(cm.shape[0]):
        for j in range(cm.shape[1]):
            ax.text(x=j, y=i, s=cm[i, j], va='center', ha='center', size='large')
    
    plt.xlabel('Predicted')
    plt.ylabel('Actual')
    plt.title(f'CM: {model_name}')
    plt.xticks([0, 1], ['Spam', 'Important'])
    plt.yticks([0, 1], ['Spam', 'Important'])
    plt.show()
    print("\n")


df = pd.read_csv('part2_dataset.csv')
text_col = 'message_body' if 'message_body' in df.columns else 'text'
label_col = 'is_important'
df['clean_text'] = df[text_col].apply(clean_text)
X = df['clean_text']
y = df[label_col]

X_train_raw, X_val_raw, y_train, y_val = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.3, random_state=42)

print("\n" + "="*50)
print("SCENARIO A: BINARY VECTORS")
print("="*50)
vectorizer_bin = CountVectorizer(binary=True)
X_train_bin = vectorizer_bin.fit_transform(X_train_raw)
X_val_bin = vectorizer_bin.transform(X_val_raw)

print(f"Vocabulary Size: {len(vectorizer_bin.get_feature_names_out())}\n")

nb_bin = BernoulliNB()
nb_bin.fit(X_train_bin, y_train)
preds_nb_bin = nb_bin.predict(X_val_bin)
evaluate_model(y_val, preds_nb_bin, "BernoulliNB (Binary)")

dt_bin = DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=5, criterion='entropy', random_state=42)
dt_bin.fit(X_train_bin, y_train)
preds_dt_bin = dt_bin.predict(X_val_bin)
evaluate_model(y_val, preds_dt_bin, "Decision Tree (Binary)")

print("\n" + "="*50)
print("SCENARIO B: COUNT VECTORS")
print("="*50)

vectorizer_count = CountVectorizer(binary=False)
X_train_count = vectorizer_count.fit_transform(X_train_raw)
X_val_count = vectorizer_count.transform(X_val_raw)

nb_count = MultinomialNB()
nb_count.fit(X_train_count, y_train)
preds_nb_count = nb_count.predict(X_val_count)
evaluate_model(y_val, preds_nb_count, "MultinomialNB (Counts)")

dt_count = DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=5, criterion='entropy', random_state=42)
dt_count.fit(X_train_count, y_train)
preds_dt_count = dt_count.predict(X_val_count)
evaluate_model(y_val, preds_dt_count, "Decision Tree (Counts)")





def clean_text(text):
    text = str(text).lower()
    text = re.sub(r'[^a-z\s]', '', text)
    words = text.split()
    manual_stopwords = {'the', 'is', 'in', 'and', 'to', 'of', 'a', 'for', 'on', 'with', 'at', 'by', 'this', 'that', 'it', 'from', 'as', 'be', 'are', 'was', 'were', 'an', 'or', 'if', 'not', 'i', 'you', 'he', 'she', 'they', 'we', 'me', 'my', 'your', 'his', 'her', 'its', 'our', 'their', 'have', 'has', 'had', 'do', 'does', 'did', 'but', 'so', 'can', 'will'}
    clean_words = [w for w in words if w not in manual_stopwords]
    return " ".join(clean_words)

df_train = pd.read_csv('part2_dataset.csv')
df_test = pd.read_csv('part2_test.csv')

text_col = 'message_body' if 'message_body' in df_train.columns else 'text'

df_train['clean_text'] = df_train[text_col].apply(clean_text)
df_test['clean_text'] = df_test[text_col].apply(clean_text)

vectorizer = CountVectorizer(binary=False) 
X_train = vectorizer.fit_transform(df_train['clean_text'])
X_test = vectorizer.transform(df_test['clean_text'])
y_train = df_train['is_important']

model = MultinomialNB()
model.fit(X_train, y_train)
predictions = model.predict(X_test)
df_test['label'] = predictions
output_file = 'part2_test_predicted.csv'
df_test.to_csv(output_file, index=False)

print(f" Prediction file saved: {output_file}")

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, RandomizedSearchCV, GridSearchCV
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier, plot_tree
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier, GradientBoostingClassifier
from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, classification_report, confusion_matrix, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score

def plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(cm, classes, title='Confusion Matrix'):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 6))
    ax.matshow(cm, cmap=plt.cm.Blues, alpha=0.7)
    
    for i in range(cm.shape[0]):
        for j in range(cm.shape[1]):
            ax.text(x=j, y=i, s=cm[i, j], va='center', ha='center', size='xx-large')
    
    plt.xlabel('Predicted Label', fontsize=12)
    plt.ylabel('True Label', fontsize=12)
    plt.title(title, fontsize=14)
    plt.xticks(np.arange(len(classes)), classes, rotation=45)
    plt.yticks(np.arange(len(classes)), classes)
    plt.show()

try:
    df = pd.read_csv('part3_dataset.csv')
except FileNotFoundError:
    print("Error: 'part3_dataset.csv' not found.")
    raise SystemExit

numeric_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['int64', 'float64']).columns
categorical_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=['object']).columns

if 'crisis_type' in categorical_cols:
    categorical_cols = categorical_cols.drop('crisis_type')

imputer_num = SimpleImputer(strategy='mean')
df[numeric_cols] = imputer_num.fit_transform(df[numeric_cols])

imputer_cat = SimpleImputer(strategy='most_frequent')
df[categorical_cols] = imputer_cat.fit_transform(df[categorical_cols])

df['midterm_score'] = df['midterm_score'].clip(0, 20)
df['avg_quiz_score'] = df['avg_quiz_score'].clip(0, 20)
df['avg_sleep_last_week'] = df['avg_sleep_last_week'].clip(0, 24)
df['sleep_hours_before_exam'] = df['sleep_hours_before_exam'].clip(0, 24)

df['readiness_index'] = (df['hours_studied_last_week'] + 1) / (df['stress_level'] + 1)

bg_mapping = {'none': 0, 'basic': 1, 'strong': 2}
if 'ai_background' in df.columns:
    df['ai_background'] = df['ai_background'].map(bg_mapping)

df = pd.get_dummies(df, columns=['mentality_type', 'exam_time'], drop_first=True)

le = LabelEncoder()
df['crisis_type_encoded'] = le.fit_transform(df['crisis_type'])
target_names = le.classes_
print(f"Target Classes: {target_names}")

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 8))
numeric_df = df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number])
corr = numeric_df.corr()
plt.imshow(corr, cmap='coolwarm', interpolation='none')
plt.colorbar()
plt.xticks(range(len(corr.columns)), corr.columns, rotation=90)
plt.yticks(range(len(corr.columns)), corr.columns)
plt.title("Correlation Matrix")
plt.show()






X = df.drop(['crisis_type', 'crisis_type_encoded'], axis=1)
y = df['crisis_type_encoded']
X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.3, random_state=42)

print("\n--- Basic Decision Tree ---")
dt = DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=5, random_state=42)
dt.fit(X_train, y_train)
preds_dt = dt.predict(X_val)

acc = accuracy_score(y_val, preds_dt)
prec_macro = precision_score(y_val, preds_dt, average='macro', zero_division=0)
rec_macro = recall_score(y_val, preds_dt, average='macro', zero_division=0)
f1_macro = f1_score(y_val, preds_dt, average='macro', zero_division=0)

print(f"Overall Accuracy: {acc:.4f}")
print(f"Macro Precision : {prec_macro:.4f}")
print(f"Macro Recall    : {rec_macro:.4f}")
print(f"Macro F1 Score  : {f1_macro:.4f}")

cm_dt = confusion_matrix(y_val, preds_dt)
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(cm_dt, classes=target_names, title="Confusion Matrix (Decision Tree)")

plt.figure(figsize=(15, 8))
plot_tree(dt, feature_names=list(X.columns), class_names=list(target_names), filled=True, max_depth=2)
plt.title("Decision Tree Structure")
plt.show()

importances = dt.feature_importances_
feature_imp_df = pd.DataFrame({'feature': X.columns, 'importance': importances})
feature_imp_df = feature_imp_df.sort_values(by='importance', ascending=False)
print("\nTop 5 Most Important Features:")
print(feature_imp_df.head(5))





print("\n--- Random Forest (RandomizedSearchCV) ---")
rf = RandomForestClassifier(random_state=42)
param_dist_rf = {
    'n_estimators': [50, 100, 200],
    'max_depth': [None, 10, 20, 30],
    'min_samples_split': [2, 5, 10],
    'min_samples_leaf': [1, 2, 4]
}
rf_search = RandomizedSearchCV(rf, param_distributions=param_dist_rf, n_iter=5, cv=3, random_state=42, n_jobs=-1)
rf_search.fit(X_train, y_train)
print("Best RF Params:", rf_search.best_params_)
preds_rf = rf_search.best_estimator_.predict(X_val)
print("Random Forest Accuracy:", accuracy_score(y_val, preds_rf))

cm_rf = confusion_matrix(y_val, preds_rf)
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(cm_rf, classes=target_names, title="Confusion Matrix (Random Forest)")

print("\n--- Gradient Boosting (GridSearchCV) ---")
gb = GradientBoostingClassifier(random_state=42)
param_grid_gb = {
    'n_estimators': [50, 100],
    'learning_rate': [0.05, 0.1],
    'max_depth': [3, 4]
}
gb_search = GridSearchCV(gb, param_grid_gb, cv=3, n_jobs=-1)
gb_search.fit(X_train, y_train)
print("Best GB Params:", gb_search.best_params_)
preds_gb = gb_search.best_estimator_.predict(X_val)
print("Gradient Boosting Accuracy:", accuracy_score(y_val, preds_gb))

cm_gb = confusion_matrix(y_val, preds_gb)
plot_confusion_matrix_mpl(cm_gb, classes=target_names, title="Confusion Matrix (Gradient Boosting)")







models_ovr = {}
probs_ovr = pd.DataFrame(index=X_val.index)

for class_name in target_names:
    class_idx = le.transform([class_name])[0]
    y_train_binary = (y_train == class_idx).astype(int)
    clf = DecisionTreeClassifier(max_depth=5, random_state=42)
    clf.fit(X_train, y_train_binary)
  
    models_ovr[class_name] = clf
    
    probs_ovr[class_name] = clf.predict_proba(X_val)[:, 1]
print("\nProbabilities for first 5 samples (Validation Set):")
print(probs_ovr.head())

final_preds_ovr_names = probs_ovr.idxmax(axis=1)

final_preds_ovr_encoded = le.transform(final_preds_ovr_names)

print("="*40)
print(f"Accuracy: {accuracy_score(y_val, final_preds_ovr_encoded):.4f}")
print("\nClassification Report:")
print(classification_report(y_val, final_preds_ovr_encoded, target_names=target_names))

Target Classes: ['Denial_mode' 'No_issue' 'panic_mode']

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor

try:
    from xgboost import XGBRegressor
    HAS_XGB = True
except Exception:
    HAS_XGB = False
    try:
        import sys, subprocess
        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "-q", "xgboost"])
        from xgboost import XGBRegressor
        HAS_XGB = True
    except Exception:
        HAS_XGB = False


def mse(y, yhat):
    y = np.asarray(y, dtype=float)
    yhat = np.asarray(yhat, dtype=float)
    return float(np.mean((y - yhat) ** 2))


def mae(y, yhat):
    y = np.asarray(y, dtype=float)
    yhat = np.asarray(yhat, dtype=float)
    return float(np.mean(np.abs(y - yhat)))


def r2(y, yhat):
    y = np.asarray(y, dtype=float)
    yhat = np.asarray(yhat, dtype=float)
    ss_res = np.sum((y - yhat) ** 2)
    ss_tot = np.sum((y - np.mean(y)) ** 2)
    return float(1.0 - ss_res / ss_tot) if ss_tot != 0 else 0.0


def preprocess_df(df, target_col):
    df = df.copy()
    X = df.drop(columns=[target_col])
    y = df[target_col].astype(float)

    num_cols = [c for c in X.columns if pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(X[c])]
    cat_cols = [c for c in X.columns if c not in num_cols]

    for c in num_cols:
        X[c] = pd.to_numeric(X[c], errors="coerce")
        X[c] = X[c].fillna(X[c].median())

    for c in cat_cols:
        X[c] = X[c].astype("object")
        if X[c].isna().any():
            mode = X[c].mode(dropna=True)
            fill = mode.iloc[0] if len(mode) > 0 else "__MISSING__"
            X[c] = X[c].fillna(fill)

    for c in num_cols:
        lo, hi = X[c].quantile(0.01), X[c].quantile(0.99)
        X[c] = X[c].clip(lo, hi)

    X = pd.get_dummies(X, columns=cat_cols, drop_first=False)
    return X, y


df = pd.read_csv("part4_dataset.csv")

target_candidates = ["score_exam_final", "final_exam_score"]
target_col = next((c for c in target_candidates if c in df.columns), None)
if target_col is None:
    raise ValueError("Target column not found.")

X, y = preprocess_df(df, target_col)

X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val = train_test_split(
    X, y, test_size=0.30, random_state=42
)

models = {
    "DecisionTreeRegressor": DecisionTreeRegressor(max_depth=6, random_state=42),
    "RandomForestRegressor": RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=300, random_state=42, n_jobs=-1),
}

if HAS_XGB:
    models["XGBRegressor"] = XGBRegressor(
        n_estimators=400,
        max_depth=5,
        learning_rate=0.06,
        subsample=0.9,
        colsample_bytree=0.9,
        reg_lambda=1.0,
        random_state=42,
        n_jobs=-1,
    )

rows = []
for name, model in models.items():
    model.fit(X_train, y_train)
    yhat = model.predict(X_val)
    rows.append({"model": name, "MSE": mse(y_val, yhat), "MAE": mae(y_val, yhat), "R2": r2(y_val, yhat)})

results = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values("MSE").reset_index(drop=True)
display(results)

star_idx = 0
star_x = X.iloc[[star_idx]]
y_true = float(y.iloc[star_idx])

T = 100
rng = np.random.default_rng(42)
pred_lists = {k: [] for k in models.keys()}

for _ in range(T):
    idx = rng.choice(len(X), size=int(0.30 * len(X)), replace=False)
    X_s = X.iloc[idx]
    y_s = y.iloc[idx]
    for name, model in models.items():
        model.fit(X_s, y_s)
        pred_lists[name].append(float(model.predict(star_x)[0]))

for name in models.keys():
    arr = np.array(pred_lists[name], dtype=float)
    print(
        name,
        "| mean:",
        float(np.mean(arr)),
        "| var:",
        float(np.var(arr)),
        "| bias^2:",
        float((np.mean(arr) - y_true) ** 2),
    )

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))
for i, name in enumerate(models.keys()):
    arr = np.array(pred_lists[name], dtype=float)
    x = np.full_like(arr, i, dtype=float) + rng.normal(0, 0.04, size=arr.size)
    plt.scatter(x, arr)

plt.axhline(y_true)
plt.xticks(range(len(models)), list(models.keys()), rotation=15)
plt.ylabel("prediction on star_x")
plt.title("Bias-Variance (30% resampling)")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
model MSE MAE R2
0 RandomForestRegressor 6.200140 1.740096 0.684786
1 XGBRegressor 6.386682 1.786422 0.675302
2 DecisionTreeRegressor 6.820529 1.882903 0.653246 
DecisionTreeRegressor | mean: 5.437228053775212 | var: 0.7843400068971451 | bias^2: 1.5945929881723393
RandomForestRegressor | mean: 5.885033333333334 | var: 0.2582532144444503 | bias^2: 0.6641706677777766
XGBRegressor | mean: 5.780414328575135 | var: 0.4859081112696434 | bias^2: 0.8456378070899209
In [44]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor

try:
    from xgboost import XGBRegressor
    HAS_XGB = True
except Exception:
    HAS_XGB = False


def prep_train_test(train_df, test_df, target_col, drop_cols=()):
    train_df = train_df.copy()
    test_df = test_df.copy()

    y = train_df[target_col].astype(float).copy()
    Xtr = train_df.drop(columns=[target_col], errors="ignore").drop(columns=list(drop_cols), errors="ignore")
    Xte = test_df.drop(columns=list(drop_cols), errors="ignore")

    num_cols = [c for c in Xtr.columns if pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype(Xtr[c])]
    cat_cols = [c for c in Xtr.columns if c not in num_cols]

    for c in num_cols:
        Xtr[c] = pd.to_numeric(Xtr[c], errors="coerce")
        med = Xtr[c].median()
        Xtr[c] = Xtr[c].fillna(med)
        Xte[c] = pd.to_numeric(Xte[c], errors="coerce").fillna(med)
        lo, hi = Xtr[c].quantile(0.01), Xtr[c].quantile(0.99)
        Xtr[c] = Xtr[c].clip(lo, hi)
        Xte[c] = Xte[c].clip(lo, hi)

    for c in cat_cols:
        Xtr[c] = Xtr[c].astype("object")
        mode = Xtr[c].mode(dropna=True)
        fill = mode.iloc[0] if len(mode) else "__MISSING__"
        Xtr[c] = Xtr[c].fillna(fill)
        Xte[c] = Xte[c].astype("object").fillna(fill)

    Xtr = pd.get_dummies(Xtr, columns=cat_cols, drop_first=False)
    Xte = pd.get_dummies(Xte, columns=cat_cols, drop_first=False)
    Xte = Xte.reindex(columns=Xtr.columns, fill_value=0)

    return Xtr, y, Xte


def train_best_regression(X, y, seed=42):
    X_tr, X_va, y_tr, y_va = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=seed)

    def mse(a, b):
        a = np.asarray(a, float); b = np.asarray(b, float)
        return float(np.mean((a - b) ** 2))

    candidates = {
        "DTR": DecisionTreeRegressor(max_depth=8, random_state=seed),
        "RFR": RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=500, random_state=seed, n_jobs=-1),
    }
    if HAS_XGB:
        candidates["XGBR"] = XGBRegressor(
            n_estimators=700, max_depth=6, learning_rate=0.05,
            subsample=0.9, colsample_bytree=0.9,
            reg_lambda=1.0, random_state=seed, n_jobs=-1,
            objective="reg:squarederror"
        )

    best_name, best_model, best_mse = None, None, float("inf")
    for name, m in candidates.items():
        m.fit(X_tr, y_tr)
        val_mse = mse(y_va, m.predict(X_va))
        if val_mse < best_mse:
            best_mse = val_mse
            best_name, best_model = name, m

    best_model.fit(X, y)
    return best_name, best_model


train = pd.read_csv("part4_dataset.csv")
test = pd.read_csv("part4_test.csv")

score_col = "final_exam_score" if "final_exam_score" in train.columns else "score_exam_final"

Xtr, y, Xte = prep_train_test(train, test, target_col=score_col)
name, model = train_best_regression(Xtr, y, seed=42)

pred = model.predict(Xte)
out = test.copy()
out["label"] = pred
out.to_csv("part4_test_predicted.csv", index=False)

print("Model:", name, "| saved:", "part4_test_predicted.csv", "| shape:", out.shape)

Model: RFR | saved: part4_test_predicted.csv | shape: (1000, 17)
